results.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation Common Stock (XOM) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts | Nasdaq
Exxon Mobil (XOM) Earnings Date & Report - Investing.com
What To Expect From ExxonMobil's (XOM) Q1 Earnings

results.summary: Q1 2026 earnings scheduled May 1, 2026 (tomorrow), before market open. EPS estimate ranges across sources: $0.98-$1.80; most cited figure ~$1.05. Analysts expect roughly 39% YoY EPS decline from Q1 2025, driven by lower realized oil prices vs. prior year and Middle East supply disruption impact on some production. Next quarter (Q2) report likely late July/early August 2026.
